General.Name: Groupe CRIT SA
General.Description: Groupe CRIT SA provides temporary staffing and recruitment services in France and internationally. It also provides airport assistance services, such as passenger and aircraft assistance, traffic, cargo transport and assistance, and training services, as well as engineering and maintenance services for industrial and technological projects. The company was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Paris, France.

1.Name: Ms. Karine  Guedj
1.Title: Deputy CEO, Director & Director of Communications and Purchasing
